title: If/Else in UI
description: Conditionally show a widget based on a boolean value.
problemStatement:
In Flutter, you can use `if` inside a `list` of widgets! Build a `Column` that always shows a `Text('App Status')`, but ONLY shows `Icon(Icons.check_circle)` if `bool isSuccess = true`.

**Requirement:** Use the collection-if syntax.
expectedOutput: A column with a text and an icon.
